title: telis smyrnea
intro: Telis smyrnea, also known as Sweet Sultan or Honey Suckle, is a flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Telis smyrnea include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as providing relief from digestive problems and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
